LanguageData.GodHand_PawnCapturedByMachine: {0} has been captured by the machine and restrained on the boat!
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.EnableGodHand.Tooltip: When disabled, you cannot use God Hand to grab or move pawns/items.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.GodHandEnableShake.Tool: Allows grabbing units and rapidly shaking them to make them vomit.
Allows using grabbed melee weapons to attack.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.GodHandEnableShootingMo: Allows using grabbed ranged weapons to shoot.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.GodHandEnableForceInges: Allows dragging food or drugs onto pawns to force ingestion.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.EnableDebugLog.Tooltip: When enabled, detailed debug logs will be output to the console.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.DisableNSFW.Tooltip: When checked, all strange interaction logic of the perpetual motion machine will be disabled.
When checked, construction of this building will be disabled, and existing buildings on the map will be automatically dismantled upon loading, returning materials.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.EnableGodWrench.Tooltip: When disabled, you cannot use God Wrench to move buildings.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.EnableCaress.Tooltip: When disabled, God Caress function will be unavailable.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.EnableCleaning.Tooltip: When disabled, God Cleaning function will be unavailable.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.EnableJudgment.Tooltip: When disabled, God Judgment function will be unavailable.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.EnablePoke.Tooltip: When disabled, God Poke function will be unavailable.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.EnableAssistant.Tooltip: When disabled, God Assistant function will be unavailable.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.GodWrenchEnableBulkScoo: Allows picking up all buildings within range at once. Be careful of the weight... just kidding, you're a god, there's no weight.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.GodWrenchEnablePrecisio: When enabled, you can fine-tune buildings at a sub-grid level using Q/E keys when picked up with the wrench. A perfectionist's boon.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.GodWrenchDescription: God Wrench allows you to move buildings in your base as you wish, even heavy defense turrets, like building blocks.
Allows resurrecting recently deceased units with a poke.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PokeEnableMentalBreakIn: Allows interrupting ongoing mental breaks with a poke.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PokeEnableInspiration.T: Poking has a chance to grant units inspiration.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PokeEnableFlick.Tooltip: Allows flicking units away like insects.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.EnableThrow.Tooltip: When disabled, you can only drag units, not throw them to cause damage.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.MaxThrowCells.Tooltip: If the distance exceeds this during a throw, the movement will be forcibly truncated.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.EnableRimTalkIntegratio: May lead to additional resource consumption.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.JudgmentReviewMode.Tool: When enabled, enters censorship mode and no longer displays the middle finger.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.RimTalk.ControlledByGod: [ This option has been redirected for processing by God Hand ]
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PlayerInfo.Title: Title
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PlayerIdentity.Tooltip: Set your name and identity for AI conversations. The AI will use this information to address you and understand your role (e.g., Name: "Divine Envoy", Identity: "Avatar of the Archotech").
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.Grabbed: I was just grabbed by {1} and moved to a new position.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.Thrown: I was just grabbed by {1} and thrown away with great force.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.ForcedIngest: I was just forced by {1} to ingest {0}.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.Vomited: I was just shaken violently by {1}, making me feel so sick that I vomited.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.Poked: I was just poked by {1}, and I still feel dizzy.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.PokedOut: My madness was just poked away by {1}, it's unbelievable.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.Epiphany: I was just poked by {1}, and I suddenly had an epiphany: {0}
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.Resurrected: I was actually brought back from the realm of the dead by {1}... I'm resurrected!
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.Flicked: I was just flicked away like an insect by {1}!
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.Caressed: I was just gently caressed by {1}, a feeling like never before...
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.ResistanceReduced: By the influence of {1}, I feel my resistance crumbling.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.NoLongerLoyal: After being caressed by {1}, my previous thoughts seem meaningless. I am no longer blindly loyal.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.Surrendered: I completely surrender to the presence of {1}. I won't run anymore, I give up.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.Healed: {1} completely healed my wounds, I feel reborn.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.AddictionCured: By the intervention of {1}, I feel my addiction swept away.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.BeingHealed: I am bathing in the healing light of {1}.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.JudgmentCrushed: I endured the terrifying crushing of {1}.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.JudgmentShockwave: I was hit by the shockwave of {1}.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.JudgmentStasis: My perception and body were forcibly suspended by {1}.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.BodySizeChanged: I feel my body size undergoing a supernatural change... My size is now {0} times the original.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.HighPriorityPrompt: [IMPORTANT: The following are recent interactions between this character and the player. These are direct player impacts on the world. Please prioritize these experiences when generating dialogue.]
LanguageData.GodHand.RimTalk.Prompt.Thrown: [Inner Monologue] I was actually grabbed by {1} and thrown away! Express my shock and complaints about this mysterious power.
LanguageData.GodHand.RimTalk.Prompt.Poked: [Inner Monologue] I was just poked by {1}! This was so sudden, express my dizziness and dissatisfaction (or gratitude after being poked awake).
LanguageData.GodHand.RimTalk.Prompt.Caressed: [Inner Monologue] The feeling of being gently caressed by {1} just now... it's really hard to describe in words. Express my intoxication and feeling flattered.
LanguageData.GodHand.RimTalk.Prompt.Grabbed: [Inner Monologue] I was just grabbed by {1} and moved elsewhere. This feeling of being completely dominated makes me feel...
LanguageData.GodHand.RimTalk.Prompt.Healed: [Inner Monologue] A miracle happened! My wound was instantly healed by {1}. Grateful for the favor of the deity.
LanguageData.GodHand.RimTalk.Prompt.Resurrected: [Inner Monologue] I... didn't I die? A flick of the finger from {1} just now actually resurrected me... discussing the miracle of this rebirth.
LanguageData.GodHand.RimTalk.Prompt.ForcedIngest: [Inner Monologue] Just now, an irresistible force made me swallow that thing... is this the will of {1}? Express my confusion and helplessness.
LanguageData.GodHand.RimTalk.System.Background: [IMPORTANT BACKGROUND] You (Pawn) have just experienced direct intervention from a transcendent power (Player).
LanguageData.GodHand.RimTalk.System.Instruction: [INSTRUCTION] Please conduct an inner monologue in the first person. Do not engage in social interactions with other pawns, only express your most true feelings, shock, or realizations at this moment.
LanguageData.GodHand.RimTalk.Prompt.JudgmentShockwave: [Inner Monologue] A huge explosion just happened near me! I'm dizzy from the shockwave, this is definitely not a mortal power... could it be the wrath of {1}? Express my fear and relief after surviving.
LanguageData.GodHand.RimTalk.Prompt.JudgmentStasis: [Inner Monologue] My whole body is locked! I can't move, it feels like time itself has stopped on me. This feeling of being dominated by absolute stasis by {1} is terrifying...
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PlayMemeSound: Play "God Hand Power is Infinite" MEME
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PlayMemeSound.Tooltip: Play preset MEME sound effects when grabbing units.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.ShowFlavorError.Tooltip: Show a humorous "fake error" message when entering the game.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CanGrabFriendly.Tooltip: Includes colonists, friendly factions, and tamed animals.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CanGrabHostile.Tooltip: Includes hostile factions, raiders, and hostile mechanoids.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CanGrabNeutral.Tooltip: Includes neutral factions, visitors, wild men, and wild animals.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.RimTalkGlobalCooldown.T: Minimum interval between all inner monologues triggered by God Hand. Increase this to prevent spam.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.RimTalkIndividualCooldo: The same character will not respond twice to God Hand intervention in a short period.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.RimTalkCustomHint: Leave empty to use default text. Supports placeholders: {0} (Character Name), {1} (Player Name).
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.ThrowDistanceHint: Tip: Fast movement speed during throw increases damage; throw distance is affected by power factor.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CaressEnablePrisonerRes: Allows reducing prisoner resistance through caressing.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CaressEnableEnemySurren: Allows converting enemies to surrender through caressing.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CaressEnableRemoveLoyal: Allows removing unwavering loyalty state from prisoners through caressing.
LanguageData.GodHand.Label: God Hand
LanguageData.GodHand.Description:
The power of the God Hand is absolute!

[Basic Controls]
Left Click: Grab/drag target, rapid movement can "throw" it.
Right Click: Immediately release grab/cancel current task.

[Assisted Shortcuts]
Q / E: Switch grab mode (Pawn ⇄ Item).
Shift + Scroll: Dynamically adjust grab influence radius.
Tab: Cycle through bottom overlapping items.

[Advanced Modes]
Enable Shooting Mode: Press Q when grabbing a ranged weapon.
Enable Melee Mode: Press E when grabbing a melee weapon.
LanguageData.GodHand.Description.Simple: Because the power of the God Hand is absolute!\nRight-click the icon to view the operation manual.
LanguageData.GodWrench.Label: God Wrench
LanguageData.GodWrench.Description:
Reshape layouts as you wish.
[Core Functions] Left Click: Drag buildings, plants, or resources. Right Click: Release building/cancel drag.
[Mode Switching] Cycle through modes with Q / E keys: - Building Mode: Normal movement. - Precision Mode: Pixel-level placement (click building to open panel). - Roof Mode: Relocate roofs and thick rock roofs. - Mineral Deposit Mode: Relocate deep mineral deposits. - Turret Head Mode: Lossless dismantling/merging of turrets.
[Advanced Operations] Shift + Left Click: Bulk attract/move. Shift+Scroll: Adjust bulk attraction radius. Tab: Cycle through overlapping buildings/resources.
LanguageData.GodWrench.Description.Simple: Carry everything!\nRight-click the icon to view the operation manual.
LanguageData.CaressGodHand_Desc:
Caress your pawns with divine warmth.
[Mood Effects] Caress a pawn to grant a +{0} mood bonus, stacks up to {1} times.
[Prisoner Interactions] Reduces resistance by {2}%, with a {3}% chance to remove unwavering loyalty, making them recruitable.
[Enemy Interactions] {4}% chance to convert an enemy, causing them to surrender immediately.
LanguageData.CaressGodHand_Desc.Simple: Caress your pawns!\nRight-click button to open introduction page.
LanguageData.CaressGodHand_NotHumanlike: {0} is not a humanlike pawn, cannot be caressed.
LanguageData.CleaningGodHand.Label: God Cleaning
LanguageData.CleaningGodHand.Description:
Purify all filth in the world.
[Three Modes] Cycle modes with Q/E keys: - Cleaning Only: Only clears filth, no drainage. - Pumping: Cleaning + moisture pumping. - Water Erasing: Cleaning + absolute drainage.
[Cleaning Only] Removes all filth, debris, and toxic pollution (Biotech).
[Pumping] Cleans while draining marshes, shallow water, mud, and other drainable terrain. Follows vanilla moisture pump logic.
[Water Erasing] Cleans while forcibly erasing all water terrain. Can clear deep water, ocean, and other water bodies that vanilla moisture pumps cannot handle.
[Bonus] Heals wounds of creatures in range ({0} points/time), cures permanent injuries and addictions. Boosts plant growth ({1}% bonus), repairs item durability.
[Controls] Q/E: Cycle modes Shift+Scroll: Adjust cleaning range.
LanguageData.CleaningGodHand.Description.Simple: Sweep away all filth!\nRight-click button to open introduction page.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CleaningEnableHealing.T: Slowly heals pawns in range when cleaning.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CleaningEnablePlantGrow: Accelerates plant growth in range when cleaning.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CleaningPlayMusic.Toolt: Play background music when using God Cleaning.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CleaningEnableRepair.To: Repairs item durability within range when cleaning.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CleaningEnableTending.T: Automatically tends to wounded creatures when cleaning.
Regenerates missing limbs or organs of creatures when cleaning.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CleaningEnableFoodPrese: Resets food freshness to prevent rotting when cleaning.
LanguageData.JudgmentGodHand.Label: God Judgment
LanguageData.JudgmentGodHand.Description:
Invoke the final judgment upon the disobedient.

[Divine Punishment]
Descend an infinitely powerful strike from the clouds, triggering local physical collapse. The central area will suffer devastating pressure, followed by high-energy shockwaves sufficient to shatter various advanced armors.

[Sudden Death Field]
Deploy a sustained 10-second high-dimensional interference field in the target area. Causal laws will be corrected in real-time; any target with biological characteristics will have its consciousness and life cycle rapidly terminated.

[Eternal Stasis]
Forcibly lock the target's temporal phase. The existence of the target will be maintained at a point of absolute stasis. In this state, the target is detached from linear time flow, and any external conventional interference cannot cause substantial changes.

[Forgiveness Mode]
Release the target's temporal phase lock. The locked target will return to reality's time flow and immediately resume biological characteristics, perception, and normal physical metabolism.
LanguageData.JudgmentGodHand.Description.Simple: Grant them terminal judgment!\nCycle modes with Q/E keys, right-click to view detailed introduction.
LanguageData.JudgmentGodHand.CannotTargetFogged: Cannot target locations in foggy areas.
LanguageData.GodHand.FlavorError.Message:
I fixed most of the errors, but I kept a few, because I feel that without some red text, you wouldn't know you're playing RIMWORLD.

Of course, you can turn off this error message in the settings.

 ——<God Hand>Pa
LanguageData.GodHand.Mood.Label: Caressed by {1} +{0}
LanguageData.GodHand.Mood.Desc: Ohhh... haaa... hnnng... it's breaking... ohhh... ❤
LanguageData.GodHand.Caress.NoLongerLoyal: {0} is no longer unwaveringly loyal and can now be recruited.
LanguageData.GodHand.Caress.Soothed: {0} was soothed; though they haven't surrendered, they've calmed down for now.
LanguageData.GodHand.Caress.Surrender: {0} surrendered under the charm of the God Caress!
LanguageData.GodHand.Caress.Hesitate: {0} feels shaken but refuses to surrender yet.
LanguageData.GodHand.Poke.Label: God Poke
LanguageData.GodHand.Poke.Desc:
Give them a small divine shock.

[Poke]
Left-click a pawn to cause strong stun and headache, but it won't cause substantial damage.

[Flick]
Hold left-click and drag to flick a pawn away like an insect!
The further you drag, the further they fly.

[Head Knock]
If the target is having a mental break, poking has a chance to snap them out of it (interrupting the break state).

[Divine Resurrection]
Left-click a corpse to have a 50% chance of resurrecting it.
The resurrected will suffer from [extreme cranial shock], and their consciousness will be very fragile for 1 day.
LanguageData.GodHand.Poke.Desc.Simple: Give these naughty pawns a poke!\nRight-click button to open introduction page.
LanguageData.GodHand.Poke.MentalBreakInterrupted: {0} was poked awake and stopped their madness!
LanguageData.GodHand.Poke.MentalBreakFailed: {0} has no reaction to the poke and continues their madness.
LanguageData.GodHand.Poke.Flicked: {0} was flicked away by God's finger!
LanguageData.GodHand.Poke.EpiphanyMessage: {0} was poked and suddenly had an epiphany! Gained inspiration: {1}
LanguageData.GodHand.Shake.Vomit: {0} was made to vomit by violent shaking.
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.MeleeHint: Melee Weapon: Drag onto target to poke
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.RangedHint: Ranged Weapon: Right-click to aim and shoot
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.RangedAttack: God Hand shot at target position with {0}!
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.OutOfRange: Target is {0:F1} cells away, exceeding range of {1} cells
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.NotMeleeWeapon: This is not a melee weapon
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.NotRangedWeapon: This is not a ranged weapon
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.MeleeModeOn: Melee Mode ON! Drag weapon to poke enemies!
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.ShootingModeOn: Shooting Mode ON! Weapon fixed, Left Click to shoot, press Q to exit!
LanguageData.GodHand.Wrench.RenderTreeEditorHint: Provide more precise node-level adjustments for Pawns
LanguageData.GodHand.PlasticSurgery.ToolDesc: Precisely adjust Pawn rendering effects, supporting position, rotation, scale, layer, and other all-round adjustments.\nClick a Pawn to open the editor.
LanguageData.GodHand.Magnifier.ScrollToScale: Scroll wheel to scale | Q/E to switch | Right-click to finish.
LanguageData.GodHand.TurretHead.NoFuelType: This turret head does not need refueling.
LanguageData.GodHand.Hediff.HeadHPBonus: Head HP Bonus: +{0} (half of total turret HP)
LanguageData.GodHand.ExitMap.JoinedCaravan: {0} was sent into a caravan by the God Hand!
LanguageData.GodHand.ExitMap.Evacuated: {0} was thrown out of the map by the God Hand!
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.ThrownToCaravan: Thrown out of the map by the God Hand and joined a caravan.
LanguageData.GodHand.Memory.ThrownOutOfMap: Thrown out of the map boundary by the God Hand.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CleaningDescription: God Cleaning not only removes dirt but also heals mind and body.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.CaressDescription: Change the status of colonists and captives through caressing.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.GodHandDescription: Grab, throw, and God Wrench harvesting configuration.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PokeDescription: God Poke and Flick function settings.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PlayerInfoDescription: Setup your virtual identity in the game.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PlayerInfo.Title: Title
LanguageData.GodHand.ProtectionHandDesc.Simple: Deploy a defense field with supreme divine power.\nRight-click button to open introduction page.
LanguageData.GodHand.ProtectionHandDesc:
Deploy a defense field with supreme divine power.

[Four Modes]
Cycle modes with Q/E keys:
- Divine Dome: Generates an omnidirectional spherical shield that blocks any incoming attacks, lasting 1 day.
- Divine Barrier: Generates a directional intercepting barrier at the target location, lasting 1 day.
- Saintly Body: Click a Pawn to apply a high-dimensional protection, granting extremely high damage reduction and armor, lasting 1 day.
- Shield Eraser: Clear any existing Divine shields (Dome or Barrier) at the target location.

[Controls]
Q/E: Switch protection mode
Scroll Wheel: Adjust generation radius or width (Hold Shift)
LanguageData.GodHand.Help.Protection.Label: God Protection
LanguageData.GodHand.Help.Protection.Desc:
Create a high-dimensional shield to ensure absolute safety.
[Divine Dome] Generates an omnidirectional spherical shield blocking any incoming projectiles. - Intercepts all ranged attacks. - Protects the interior from external threats.
[Saintly Body] Apply high-dimensional protection to a single unit. - Grants extremely high damage reduction and armor. - Prevents death from health-related causes. - Lasts 1 day.
[Shield Eraser] Removes any existing Divine Dome or Barrier at the target location.
[Controls] Q/E: Switch protection mode Shift+Scroll: Adjust shield radius
LanguageData.GodHand.Protection.ShieldsErased: Shields in range have been erased.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.ProtectionDescription: Configure the effective range and duration of various protection fields here.
LanguageData.GodHand.Protection.InterceptedOrbital: God Protection deflected an orbital strike!
LanguageData.GodHand.Protection.InterceptedSkyfaller: God Protection deflected a falling object!
LanguageData.GodHand.Protection.Resurrected: Divine Miracle! {0} returns from the brink of death!
LanguageData.GodHand.Protection.PreventDestroy: Saintly Body prevented the destruction of {0}!
LanguageData.GodHand.Protection.TearSpaceReturn: {0} tore through space and returned to the battlefield!
LanguageData.GodHand.Protection.SpaceAnchoredLost: {0} is lost in the void, being anchored by Saintly protection and attempting to pull back!
LanguageData.GodHand.Protection.SpaceAnchoredReturned: {0} has returned after drifting in the void!
LanguageData.GodHand.Protection.DriftingInVoid: {0}'s map has disappeared, their soul is drifting in the void, waiting for a new settlement...
LanguageData.GodHand.AssistantHandDesc.Simple: Me, tightening screws? Seriously?\nClick a workbench to start.\nRight-click button to open introduction page.
LanguageData.GodHand.AssistantHandDesc:
Me, tightening screws? Seriously?

[Controls]
Q/E: Switch assistant mode
Left Click: Enable assistant (on target)
Shift+Left Click: Disable assistant

[Artisan's Touch]
Automatically takes over a workbench for high-speed production.
- Click Workbench: Toggle takeover

[Healer's Touch]
- Click Patient or Bed: Automatically perform treatment and surgery
LanguageData.GodHand.Assistant.WorkFinished: Assistant has assisted in completing workbench task: {0}
LanguageData.GodHand.Assistant.ThreadAdded: Introducing a new Divine sequence! Current concurrent tasks: {0}
LanguageData.GodHand.Assistant.MaxLimitReached: Divine burden is too heavy. Assistant total has reached the limit ({0})
LanguageData.GodHand.Assistant.Enabled: God Assistant has descended and taken over the workbench.
LanguageData.GodHand.Assistant.AlreadyActive: God Assistant is already serving this target.
LanguageData.GodHand.Assistant.Disabled: God Assistant has withdrawn, returning control.
LanguageData.GodHand.Assistant.MedicalNotImplemented: Healer's Touch functionality is currently being rewritten and is temporarily unavailable.
LanguageData.GodHand.Assistant.NoActiveBill: The workbench currently has no active bill tasks.
LanguageData.GodHand.Assistant.NoInjuryToTend: This target currently has no injuries to treat or surgical tasks.
LanguageData.GodHand.Assistant.IngredientsTeleported: Required materials have been sourced from the map and teleported: {0}.
LanguageData.GodHand.Assistant.Name: God Hand
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.EnableSurgeryQuiz: Somewhat balanced but likely unbalanced medical mode
LanguageData.GodHand.Quiz.Title: Me, performing surgery? Seriously?
LanguageData.GodHand.Quiz.Description: Wait a sec, let me see how this surgery is done......
LanguageData.GodHand.Quiz.Correct: Hmm, seems like that's how it is.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.Assistant.VisualNote: Note: My advice is don't enable this.
LanguageData.GeneratorGodHand.Label: God Crank
LanguageData.GeneratorGodHand.Description.Simple: Do I have to turn the crank, too?\nYes.
LanguageData.GeneratorGodHand.Description:
Do I have to turn the crank, too?
Yes. 

[Controls]
Aim at any [Generator] or [Battery], click and start moving your mouse in circles.
The faster you move, the more amazing the energy produced!
Don't break your wrist!
LanguageData.GeneratorGodHand.MustBePowerTarget: Target must be a generator or battery connected to power.
LanguageData.GodHand_HandleBlocked: Generator handle position blocked (wall or other building)
LanguageData.GodHand_HandleOutOfBounds: Generator handle position outside map boundary
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.Generator.FormulaText: P = lim[ε→Tynan] { [(Speed / 360) ^ Exponent] * 2000 * Multiplier * World Offset / Stability } / (Space Stability ⊗ Positron Annihilation) * log_ERROR ^ Probability of 酒狐 Existence - ∫(Relic Δ dt)
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.Generator.ShowSimplifie: A boon for math-phobes or normal people. Replaces the complex derivation formula with a human-readable elementary algebra formula.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.Generator.EnableFTLCran: When enabled, if you shake the crank so fast that rotation exceeds physical thresholds, the system will collapse reality and instantly output infinite power, enough to fill all connected batteries.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.Generator.EnableAbsurdR: Front wheel doesn't turn, back wheel does
If the front wheel turns, the back wheel definitely won't.
LanguageData.GodHand.Generator.OnlyCleanupWhilePlayin: Cleanup can only be performed while in-game.
LanguageData.GodHand.Generator.CleanupSuccess: Successfully cleaned up {0} hand crank generators and returned materials.
LanguageData.GodHand.Generator.NoGeneratorsFound: No existing hand crank generators found on the map.
LanguageData.GodHand.TurretModule.NoTurretHead: {0} does not have a turret head equipped
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PlayerPersona.Default: A formless Archotech; It does not exist, yet it is everywhere.
LanguageData.GodHand.Settings.PlayerInfo.Thoughts.Def: Observing the colony, planning the future
LanguageData.GodHand.EndRod.ObserverDesc: Warning: Removing the observer will stop the machine.
LanguageData.GodHand.EndRod.ReleasePrisonersDesc: Release prisoners currently bound on the boat.
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.Mode.Shooting.Hint: Shooting Mode: Left-Click to shoot! (Q to turn off)
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.Mode.Melee.Hint: Melee Mode: Drag to poke! (E to turn off)
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.Mode.Hybrid.Hint: Hybrid Weapon: E for Melee Mode / Q for Shooting Mode
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.Mode.MeleeOnly.Hint: Melee Weapon: E to enable Melee Mode
LanguageData.GodHand.Weapon.Mode.RangedOnly.Hint: Ranged Weapon: Q to enter Shooting Mode
